brief: An independent streetwear label dropping limited seasonal collections with a strong subcultural point of view. The audience is fashion-forward young shoppers following drops. Pages should cover the brand/manifesto, the current collection/lookbook, individual product detail, the drop schedule/archive, and stores/contact. Lean into a brutalist, high-contrast aesthetic: stark black-and-white, oversized grotesque type, an intentionally grid-breaking layout, and raw, confrontational energy.
summary: Built REFUSE® — a brutalist, high-contrast streetwear site (6 pages: home, manifesto, lookbook, product, drop schedule/archive, stores/contact) with a shared Archivo/Space Mono design system, garment-schematic SVG graphics, an acid-yellow disruptor, and intentionally grid-breaking layouts.
